---
title: "audit_dialogue.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\new_world_seed\.agents\scripts\audit_dialogue.py"
loc: 52
complexity: 6
logic_score: 3.27
style_score: 3.48
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.31
---

## Intent
The `audit_dialogue.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on run_audit. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via run_audit. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [sv_engine](file://sv_engine)

### Exports
- `run_audit`
